name: AO
meaning: SMA((high + low) / 2, 5) - SMA((high + low) / 2, 34)
notes: Bill Williams Awesome Oscillator

name: ATR
meaning: WilderAverage(true range, 14)
notes: J. Welles Wilder ATR

name: BBD
notes: project-defined momentum derivative; not exchange fund-flow data

name: CCI
meaning: (typical price - SMA14) / (0.015 * mean deviation)
notes: Donald Lambert CCI

name: EMA
meaning: N-day exponential moving average of close
formula: N-day exponential moving average of close
notes: standard EMA definition

name: FIB
meaning: rolling high/low retracement levels
notes: project price-zone convention

name: KDJ
meaning: RSV(9), K and D smoothed recursively with alpha=1/3, J=3K-2D
formula: RSV(9), K and D smoothed recursively with alpha=1/3, J=3K-2D
notes: domestic KDJ convention

name: MA
meaning: N-day simple moving average of close
formula: N-day simple moving average of close
notes: standard SMA definition

name: MACD
meaning: DIF=EMA12-EMA26; DEA=EMA(DIF,9); MACD=2*(DIF-DEA)
notes: standard MACD with mainland-China histogram scaling

name: RSI
meaning: 100 - 100/(1 + WilderAverage(gain)/WilderAverage(loss))
notes: J. Welles Wilder RSI

name: VWAP
meaning: cumulative(typical price * volume) / cumulative(volume)
notes: daily cumulative VWAP proxy; not intraday session VWAP
